title: camsys
description: System-level tooling for the CAM ecosystem — CLI + library + UI subpath + standalone Electron app, all backed by one on-disk registry at ~/.cam/run/.

topics.title: Overview
topics.description: What camsys is — system-level tooling for the CAM ecosystem (CLI + library + UI + standalone Electron app, backed by one on-disk registry).

topics.title: Migration notes
topics.description: Historical migration notes for consumers upgrading across breaking camsys versions.

topics.title: C4 — Context (L1)
topics.description: camsys among external actors: developers, CAM apps, OS process model, kernel, filesystem, @electron/rebuild, wrapped children.

topics.title: C4 — Containers (L2)
topics.description: The four runnable / publishable units that make up camsys — CLI binary, library module, UI subpath, standalone Electron app — and their connections.

topics.title: C4 — Components (L3)
topics.description: One component diagram per non-trivial container — library module (registry/ports leaves + spawn/commands/host/rebuild + re-export shell), UI subpath (ServicesPanel + BackToCam + the ServicesIO transport-injection contract), and standalone Electron app (main + renderer, plus the mobile-mode sequence).

topics.title: Development rules (CLAUDE.md)
topics.description: Maintainer + AI-agent contract: the four faces, what lives where, architectural rules, extraction lens for when to add a new public surface.
